facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and stumble onto Pacific Boat. 4.7 stars, 170 reviews, and most tourists walk straight past it. Cửa Lấp doesn't get enough credit. This spot does. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Boats. Water. A 4.7-star spot on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo that barely anyone talks about. Pacific Boat at Cửa Lấp hits different when you actually stop.

instagram.caption: POV: walked past this three times. Pacific Boat, Cửa Lấp. 4.7★, 170 reviews. Don't be me. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: 4.7 stars on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Pacific Boat. Tourists keep walking past this one.

tiktok.caption: Walked past it 3 times. Pacific Boat, Cửa Lấp. 4.7★ and barely on anyone's radar. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel
